title: 7 Inch Sapphire Nail File Home Manicure Pedicure Tool Beauty and Personal Care
description:
The Sapphire Nail File is a great beauty tool to keep with your other make up and nail supplies or in your purse for on-the-go touch ups. Each file is constructed of durable metal and features identical grit on both sides. The tip of the nail file will double as a nail cleaner, and the end of the handle is a cuticle pusher. Make sure to keep one of these around for manicures, pedicures and touch ups on the go!
